mapper.select: WITH MONTHS AS ( SELECT LEVEL AS MONTH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), CHECK_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(t.END_DATE, 'MM')) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS SPOT_CHECK_COUNT FROM E_CHECK_TASK t WHERE t.EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND t.STATUS = '2' AND TO_CHAR(t.END_DATE, 'YYYY') = #{year} AND t.END_DATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(t.END_DATE, 'MM')) ), MAINT_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(m.ACCEPTANCE_TIME, 'MM')) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS FAULT_COUNT FROM E_MAINT_INFO m WHERE m.EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND m.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND m.STATUS IN (5, 6) AND TO_CHAR(m.ACCEPTANCE_TIME, 'YYYY') = #{year} AND m.ACCEPTANCE_TIME IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(m.ACCEPTANCE_TIME, 'MM')) ), LUBRICATION_DATA AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(p.END_DATE, 'MM')) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS LUBRICATION_COUNT FROM E_PM_MAINTAIN_TASK p WHERE p.EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND TO_CHAR(p.END_DATE, 'YYYY') = #{year} AND p.END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND p.STATUS = 2 GROUP BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(p.END_DATE, 'MM')) ) SELECT m.MONTH AS month, NVL(cd.SPOT_CHECK_COUNT, 0) AS spotCheckCount, NVL(md.FAULT_COUNT, 0) AS faultCount, NVL(ld.LUBRICATION_COUNT, 0) AS lubricationCount FROM MONTHS m LEFT JOIN CHECK_DATA cd ON m.MONTH = cd.MONTH LEFT JOIN MAINT_DATA md ON m.MONTH = md.MONTH LEFT JOIN LUBRICATION_DATA ld ON m.MONTH = ld.MONTH ORDER BY m.MONTH
